name: @jspsych-timelines/trail-making
description: Trail Making Test (TMT) for measuring visual attention and task switching. Includes Part A (numbers) and Part B (alternating numbers and letters).

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,iife,cjs --sourcemap --dts --treeshake --clean --global-name jsPsychTimelineTrailMaking --inject-style && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js','dist/index.browser.js')" && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.global.js.map','dist/index.browser.js.map')"
